title: PalLLM Project Numbers (rolling state)
description: Single source of truth for the cross-doc rolling counts (test count, drift gates, build warnings, API routes, MCP tool count, feature catalog, fallback strategy count, ADR count, honest roadmap percentage). The 16 drift gates in scripts/run_full_audit.ps1 enforce that docs match these numbers. Source of truth: docs/PROJECT_NUMBERS.json.

$schema.description: Optional pointer back to this schema. Editors with JSON Schema support use it to validate inline.

$comment.description: Optional human-readable comment. Ignored by validators.

project.description: Project name. Pinned to the constant.

kind.description: One-line description of what PalLLM is.

baselineDate.description: ISO-8601 (yyyy-MM-dd) date of the most recent baseline roll. Cross-checked by Drift_Doc_freshness against per-doc 'Last audited' stamps and by the SelfDescriptionBuilder hardcoded-literals meta-test.

tests.description: Executable NUnit case count (Test + TestCase attributes). Cross-checked by Drift_Test_count_docs.

driftGates.description: Drift gate result in 'passed/total' form, e.g. '16/16'.

buildWarnings.description: Warning count from dotnet build Release. Always 0; treat any non-zero as a regression.

apiRoutes.description: /api/* route count. Cross-checked by Drift_Api_route_count against api.Map* calls in Program.cs.

operationalRoutes.description: Operational routes outside /api (root index, metrics, health, openapi).

mcpTools.description: MCP tool count ([McpServerTool] attributes). Cross-checked by SelfDescriptionBuilder_HardcodedLiterals_MatchProjectNumbers meta-test.

fallbackStrategies.description: Try_* method count in FallbackBehaviorEngine.cs. Cross-checked by Drift_Fallback_strategy_count and the SelfDescriptionBuilder meta-test.

featureCatalog.description: Feature catalog entry count (Id = entries in PalLlmFeatureCatalog.cs). Cross-checked by Drift_Feature_catalog_count.

featureReady.description: Feature catalog entries with status Ready.

featureScaffolded.description: Feature catalog entries with status Scaffolded.

featureDeferred.description: Feature catalog entries with status Deferred.

adrsAccepted.description: Markdown files under docs/adr/ with Status: Accepted.

runtime.description: Runtime/framework version anchors. Should agree with .csproj TargetFramework, the lua workflow, and the MCP server config.

linksToSourceOfTruth.description: Map of count-name -> human-readable source-of-truth pointer. Documents which file each count is gated against.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the rolling state.
